lookups.label: Lookups
lookups.description: SQL for field lookups — populate a field when another field changes

templates.name: Latest non-system note
templates.description: Gets the most recent action note that wasn't made by System
templates.use_case: Populate a custom field with the latest update note on the ticket
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  CONVERT(nvarchar(max), note) AS [lookup]
FROM
  actions a
WHERE
  faultid = $ticketid
  AND who != 'System'
ORDER BY
  whe_ DESC

templates.name: Ticket user's email
templates.description: Gets the email address of the end user on the ticket
templates.use_case: Auto-fill an email field based on the ticket's user
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  u.UEmail AS [lookup]
FROM
  users u
  INNER JOIN faults f ON f.UserID = u.uid
WHERE
  f.Faultid = $ticketid

templates.name: Ticket user's site name
templates.description: Gets the site name for the user on the ticket
templates.use_case: Display the user's site name in a custom field
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  s.SDesc AS [lookup]
FROM
  site s
  INNER JOIN users u ON u.Usite = s.SSitenum
  INNER JOIN faults f ON f.UserID = u.uid
WHERE
  f.Faultid = $ticketid

templates.name: Organisation name
templates.description: Gets the organisation/client name for the ticket
templates.use_case: Show the client name in a field
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  a.AAreaDesc AS [lookup]
FROM
  area a
  INNER JOIN faults f ON f.Areaint = a.AArea
WHERE
  f.Faultid = $ticketid

templates.name: Assigned agent's email
templates.description: Gets the email address of the currently assigned agent
templates.use_case: Send notifications to the assigned agent
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  un.USMTP AS [lookup]
FROM
  uname un
  INNER JOIN faults f ON f.AssignedToInt = un.UNum
WHERE
  f.Faultid = $ticketid

templates.name: SLA name for ticket
templates.description: Gets the SLA name associated with the ticket
templates.use_case: Display the SLA name on the ticket
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  sl.SLDesc AS [lookup]
FROM
  slahead sl
  INNER JOIN faults f ON f.SLAID = sl.SLID
WHERE
  f.Faultid = $ticketid

templates.name: Priority name for ticket
templates.description: Gets the priority level name for the ticket
templates.use_case: Display the priority label
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  p.PDesc AS [lookup]
FROM
  policy p
  INNER JOIN faults f ON f.Seriousness = p.PPolicy
WHERE
  f.Faultid = $ticketid

templates.name: Open ticket count for user
templates.description: Counts how many open tickets the current user has
templates.use_case: Show workload indicator per user
templates.sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS [lookup]
FROM
  faults f
WHERE
  f.UserID = (SELECT UserID FROM faults WHERE Faultid = $ticketid)
  AND f.DateCleared IS NULL

templates.name: Total time spent on ticket
templates.description: Sums all time entries on the current ticket
templates.use_case: Display total effort on the ticket
templates.sql:
SELECT
  ISNULL(SUM(a.TimeTaken), 0) AS [lookup]
FROM
  actions a
WHERE
  a.Faultid = $ticketid
  AND a.TimeTaken > 0

templates.name: Primary asset tag
templates.description: Gets the asset tag/inventory number of the ticket's linked device
templates.use_case: Display the asset tag on the ticket
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  d.DInvNo AS [lookup]
FROM
  device d
  INNER JOIN faults f ON f.DeviceNumber = d.DDevNum AND f.DevSite = d.DSite
WHERE
  f.Faultid = $ticketid

reports.label: Reports
reports.description: SQL for custom report data sources

templates.name: Open tickets by agent
templates.description: Lists open ticket counts grouped by assigned agent
templates.use_case: Agent workload report
templates.sql:
SELECT
  un.UName AS [Agent],
  COUNT(f.Faultid) AS [Open Tickets]
FROM
  faults f
  INNER JOIN uname un ON f.AssignedToInt = un.UNum
WHERE
  f.DateCleared IS NULL
GROUP BY
  un.UName
ORDER BY
  [Open Tickets] DESC

templates.name: Tickets by status
templates.description: Counts tickets grouped by their current status
templates.use_case: Status distribution overview
templates.sql:
SELECT
  ts.TStatusDesc AS [Status],
  COUNT(f.Faultid) AS [Count]
FROM
  faults f
  INNER JOIN tstatus ts ON f.Status = ts.TStatus
GROUP BY
  ts.TStatusDesc
ORDER BY
  [Count] DESC

templates.name: Tickets by organisation
templates.description: Counts tickets per client/organisation
templates.use_case: Client volume report
templates.sql:
SELECT
  a.AAreaDesc AS [Organisation],
  COUNT(f.Faultid) AS [Tickets]
FROM
  faults f
  INNER JOIN area a ON f.Areaint = a.AArea
GROUP BY
  a.AAreaDesc
ORDER BY
  [Tickets] DESC

templates.name: SLA breaches
templates.description: Lists tickets that breached their resolution SLA
templates.use_case: SLA compliance report
templates.sql:
SELECT
  f.Faultid AS [Ticket],
  f.Username AS [User],
  ts.TStatusDesc AS [Status],
  sl.SLDesc AS [SLA],
  p.PDesc AS [Priority],
  f.FixByDate AS [Due By],
  f.DateCleared AS [Cleared]
FROM
  faults f
  INNER JOIN tstatus ts ON f.Status = ts.TStatus
  LEFT JOIN slahead sl ON f.SLAID = sl.SLID
  LEFT JOIN policy p ON f.Seriousness = p.PPolicy
WHERE
  f.SLAState = 'O'
ORDER BY
  f.FixByDate DESC

templates.name: Time logged by agent
templates.description: Total time logged by each agent over a period
templates.use_case: Agent utilisation report
templates.sql:
SELECT
  a.Who AS [Agent],
  SUM(a.TimeTaken) AS [Total Minutes],
  ROUND(SUM(a.TimeTaken) / 60.0, 2) AS [Total Hours]
FROM
  actions a
WHERE
  a.TimeTaken > 0
  AND a.Whe_ >= DATEADD(day, -30, GETDATE())
GROUP BY
  a.Who
ORDER BY
  [Total Minutes] DESC

templates.name: Customer satisfaction scores
templates.description: Average feedback score per agent
templates.use_case: CSAT report by agent
templates.sql:
SELECT
  un.UName AS [Agent],
  COUNT(fb.FBFaultid) AS [Responses],
  AVG(CAST(fb.FBScore AS FLOAT)) AS [Avg Score]
FROM
  feedback fb
  INNER JOIN faults f ON fb.FBFaultid = f.Faultid
  INNER JOIN uname un ON f.ClearWhoInt = un.UNum
GROUP BY
  un.UName
ORDER BY
  [Avg Score] ASC

templates.name: Asset inventory by type
templates.description: Lists asset counts grouped by asset type and group
templates.use_case: Asset inventory overview
templates.sql:
SELECT
  g.GDesc AS [Group],
  xt.TDesc AS [Type],
  COUNT(d.DDevNum) AS [Count]
FROM
  device d
  INNER JOIN xtype xt ON d.DTYPE = xt.TTypeNum
  INNER JOIN generic g ON xt.TGeneric = g.GGeneric
GROUP BY
  g.GDesc, xt.TDesc
ORDER BY
  g.GDesc, xt.TDesc

haloutils_now.label: HaloPlus Now
haloutils_now.description: High-value ticket, timeline, and commercial queries for day-to-day work

templates.name: Ticket 360 summary
templates.description: Full ticket context with requester, assignment, SLA, site, client, and linked asset
templates.use_case: Understand the current ticket quickly without jumping across multiple forms
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  F.Faultid AS [Ticket ID],
  F.Symptom AS [Summary],
  TS.TStatusDesc AS [Status],
  P.PDesc AS [Priority],
  RT.RTDesc AS [Ticket Type],
  SL.SLDesc AS [SLA],
  F.SLAState AS [SLA State],
  F.DateOccured AS [Opened],
  F.FixByDate AS [Due By],
  F.DateCleared AS [Closed],
  U.uid AS [User ID],
  U.UUsername AS [End User],
  U.UEmail AS [User Email],
  U.UMobile AS [User Mobile],
  A.AArea AS [Client ID],
  A.AAreaDesc AS [Client],
  S.SSitenum AS [Site ID],
  S.SDesc AS [Site],
  AU.UNum AS [Assigned Agent ID],
  AU.UName AS [Assigned Agent],
  AU.USMTP AS [Assigned Agent Email],
  CU.UNum AS [Closed By ID],
  CU.UName AS [Closed By],
  D.DDevNum AS [Asset ID],
  D.DInvNo AS [Asset Tag]
FROM
  Faults F
  LEFT JOIN Users U ON F.UserID = U.uid
  LEFT JOIN TStatus TS ON F.Status = TS.TStatus
  LEFT JOIN Policy P ON F.Seriousness = P.PPolicy
  LEFT JOIN RequestType RT ON F.RequestTypeNew = RT.RTID
  LEFT JOIN SLAHead SL ON F.SLAID = SL.SLID
  LEFT JOIN Area A ON F.Areaint = A.AArea
  LEFT JOIN Site S ON F.SiteNumber = S.SSitenum
  LEFT JOIN Uname AU ON F.AssignedToInt = AU.UNum
  LEFT JOIN Uname CU ON F.ClearWhoInt = CU.UNum
  LEFT JOIN Device D ON F.DeviceNumber = D.DDevNum AND F.DevSite = D.DevSite
WHERE
  F.Faultid = $ticketid

templates.name: Ticket action timeline
templates.description: Recent actions, emails, visibility flags, and time entries for the current ticket
templates.use_case: Review ticket history before replying or escalating
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 25
  ActionNumber AS [Action ID],
  Who AS [Who],
  Whe_ AS [When],
  ActOutcome AS [Outcome],
  LEFT(CONVERT(nvarchar(max), Note), 400) AS [Note],
  TimeTaken AS [Time Taken],
  DateEmailed AS [Date Emailed],
  ActionHide AS [Hidden]
FROM
  Actions
WHERE
  Faultid = $ticketid
ORDER BY
  Whe_ DESC,
  ActionNumber DESC

templates.name: Ticket commercial trace
templates.description: Follow a ticket through quotes, sales orders, purchase orders, and invoices
templates.use_case: Understand whether fulfilment or billing has already started for a ticket
templates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  Trace.RecordType AS [Record Type],
  Trace.RecordID AS [Record ID],
  Trace.Title AS [Title],
  Trace.RecordDate AS [Date],
  Trace.RefCode AS [Reference]
FROM (
  SELECT 'Quote' AS RecordType, CAST(QH.qhid AS nvarchar(50)) AS RecordID, QH.QHtitle AS Title, QH.QHDate AS RecordDate, QH.QHPORef AS RefCode
  FROM QUOTATIONHEADER QH
  WHERE QH.QHfaultID = $ticketid
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Sales Order' AS RecordType, CAST(OH.OHid AS nvarchar(50)) AS RecordID, OH.OHtitle AS Title, OH.OHorderdate AS RecordDate, OH.OHponumber AS RefCode
  FROM ORDERHEAD OH
  WHERE OH.OHfaultid = $ticketid OR OH.OHprojectfaultid = $ticketid
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Purchase Order' AS RecordType, CAST(SOH.SHid AS nvarchar(50)) AS RecordID, SOH.SHtitle AS Title, SOH.SHPODate AS RecordDate, SOH.SHPORef AS RefCode
  FROM SUPPLIERORDERHEADER SOH
  WHERE SOH.SHfaultID = $ticketid
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Invoice' AS RecordType, CAST(IH.ihid AS nvarchar(50)) AS RecordID, IH.IHname AS Title, IH.ihdatepaid AS RecordDate, IH.IH3rdPartyInvoiceNumber AS RefCode
  FROM InvoiceHeader IH
  INNER JOIN InvoiceDetail ID ON ID.IdIHid = IH.ihid
  WHERE ID.IDFaultid = $ticketid
) Trace
ORDER BY
  Trace.RecordDate DESC,
  Trace.RecordType

templates.name: Open tickets for the same user
templates.description: Find the current user's other open tickets for better context
templates.use_case: Spot patterns, duplicate issues, or related outstanding work before updating the ticket
templates.sql:
SELECT
  F.Faultid AS [Ticket ID],
  TS.TStatusDesc AS [Status],
  F.Symptom AS [Summary],
  AU.UName AS [Assigned Agent],
  F.DateOccured AS [Opened],
  F.FixByDate AS [Due By]
FROM
  Faults F
  LEFT JOIN TStatus TS ON F.Status = TS.TStatus
  LEFT JOIN Uname AU ON F.AssignedToInt = AU.UNum
WHERE
  F.UserID = (SELECT TOP 1 UserID FROM Faults WHERE Faultid = $ticketid)
  AND F.DateCleared IS NULL
  AND F.Faultid <> $ticketid
ORDER BY
  F.DateOccured DESC

templates.name: SLA explainer
templates.description: Resolve the current ticket's SLA, priority, and target timings into a readable view
templates.use_case: Explain why a ticket has a given due date or breach state
templates.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
  F.Faultid AS [Ticket ID],
  P.PDesc AS [Priority],
  P.PResponseTime AS [Response Target],
  P.PResponseUnits AS [Response Units],
  P.PTime AS [Resolution Target],
  P.PUnits AS [Resolution Units],
  SL.SLDesc AS [SLA],
  F.SLAState AS [SLA State],
  F.DateOccured AS [Opened],
  F.FixByDate AS [Due By],
  F.DateCleared AS [Closed]
FROM
  Faults F
  LEFT JOIN Policy P ON F.Seriousness = P.PPolicy
  LEFT JOIN SLAHead SL ON F.SLAID = SL.SLID
WHERE
  F.Faultid = $ticketid

data_queries.label: Data queries
data_queries.description: SQL for finding specific records and data

templates.name: Full ticket details
templates.description: Gets comprehensive ticket information with all joined data
templates.use_case: Detailed ticket view with all related names
templates.sql:
SELECT
  f.Faultid AS [Ticket],
  f.Username AS [User],
  u.UEmail AS [Email],
  ts.TStatusDesc AS [Status],
  p.PDesc AS [Priority],
  rt.RTDesc AS [Type],
  un.UName AS [Assigned To],
  a.AAreaDesc AS [Organisation],
  s.SDesc AS [Site],
  sl.SLDesc AS [SLA],
  f.DateOccured AS [Opened],
  f.FixByDate AS [Due By],
  f.DateCleared AS [Closed]
FROM
  faults f
  LEFT JOIN users u ON f.UserID = u.uid
  LEFT JOIN tstatus ts ON f.Status = ts.TStatus
  LEFT JOIN policy p ON f.Seriousness = p.PPolicy
  LEFT JOIN requesttype rt ON f.RequestTypeNew = rt.RTID
  LEFT JOIN uname un ON f.AssignedToInt = un.UNum
  LEFT JOIN area a ON f.Areaint = a.AArea
  LEFT JOIN site s ON f.SiteNumber = s.SSitenum
  LEFT JOIN slahead sl ON f.SLAID = sl.SLID
WHERE
  f.Faultid = $ticketid

templates.name: All tickets for a user
templates.description: Lists all tickets belonging to the current ticket's user
templates.use_case: View user's ticket history
templates.sql:
SELECT
  f.Faultid AS [Ticket],
  ts.TStatusDesc AS [Status],
  f.DateOccured AS [Opened],
  f.DateCleared AS [Closed],
  un.UName AS [Assigned To]
FROM
  faults f
  LEFT JOIN tstatus ts ON f.Status = ts.TStatus
  LEFT JOIN uname un ON f.AssignedToInt = un.UNum
WHERE
  f.UserID = $userid
ORDER BY
  f.DateOccured DESC
